title: eulophia crepidata
intro: Eulophia crepidata is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and snake bites. The leaves and roots of Eulophia crepidata are used to prepare various herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which are said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into a paste or infused in water to be used as a treatment for various ailments.
